essence: Audits buildings and systems to ensure fire safety compliance and reduce risk to occupants.

identity.title: Fire Safety Auditor
identity.summary: Inspects premises, reviews fire risk assessments, and advises on remedial actions to meet regulatory standards and improve safety.

salary.notes: Consultancy roles and specialist auditors in high‑risk sectors command higher fees.

qualifications: Fire safety qualification or relevant technical background
Experience conducting fire risk assessments and audits
Knowledge of building regulations and fire codes
Strong report writing and stakeholder communication skills

lifestyle.description: Field inspections and office reporting; frequent site visits and liaison with facilities teams and regulators.

habits: Prepares clear audit reports and recommendations
Advises on remedial works and compliance
Keeps up to date with regulations and guidance
